name: harness-marketplace
description: Generate project-specific development pipeline harness skills via interactive scaffolding wizard. Supports web, mobile, backend, desktop, game, CLI, data/ML, and IoT project types.

plugins.name: harness-marketplace
plugins.description: Interactive scaffolding wizard → project-config.yaml + plan/implement/verify skills + agents + guides. Hybrid generation: template structure + AI-generated specialists.
